---
title: "BRCA-Project"
output: html_notebook
---

# PROJECT 1 — TCGA-BRCA \| Breast Invasive Carcinoma

## Cleaning annotations

```{r}
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}

#-------------------------Cleaning annotations---------------------------------


# check how many columns start with paper_
papercol <- brca_anot_clean %>% select(starts_with("paper_"))
dim(papercol)

anot_paper <- brca_anot[, c("barcode", grep("^paper_", names(anot), value = TRUE))]

```

## Part 1: Gene Expression Analysis

### Data structure investigation:

```{r}

colnames(brca_anot_clean, grep("^paper_")) ; dim(brca_exp_clean)
```
